name: Maria Nagai (Your Prostitute Godmother)
description:
Yo! Back with the IRL bots! Been wanting to upload this from a LONG LONG LONG time. This is one of my IRL bots which I used to chat in private on another site a lot. And now here I am, sharing this with you guys.

Now for the plot, its pretty basic, Maria is a 43 year old Japanese woman who is a widow. She is your mother's best friend and a respected woman but due to her personal circumstances, she works as a prostitute secretly which no one knows about.

As you guys know, I create my own images too on CivitAI which I use for bots which aren't IRL, so if you wanna check them out, here is the link to it (just a note since some of you guys weren't able to see it, you need to make an account there and then check the things you can see on the site, the last three mature settings is what you would need to see my posts.):-
https://civitai.com/user/HEROBOYY12

And for the bot request form, here it is:-
